_comment: F-16A stability derivative oracle. Source: NASA TM-80123 (Nguyen et al., 1979) 'Simulator Study of Stall/Post-Stall Characteristics of a Fighter Airplane with Relaxed Longitudinal Stability'. Cn_beta at 0.2 Mach, sea level, alpha=5 deg.

oracle_values.Cn_beta_source: NASA TM-80123, Table II, alpha=5 deg, M=0.2, sea level. Cn_beta = 0.12/rad linear range.
oracle_values._note: NASA TM-80123 tabulates Cn_beta_total = 0.12/rad for the F-16 at low alpha, including both vtail and fuselage contributions. The fuselage is destabilising (~-0.02/rad), vtail contributes ~+0.14/rad.
